Yoga for freaks ;—People might say that there are some strange
children bom with two heads etc. They might wish to know if

122 FUNDAMENTALS OF ASTROLOGY
there are any astrological reasons for such things. Yes. I shall
give here only one Yoga : If Mercury is in the 5th or 9th house,
and the other planets weak, the child will have two heads, four
hands and four feet.
Yoga for dumbness '—If the Moon be in Taurus and the male-
fics viz. the Sun, Mars and Saturn, posited severally or jointly
in the last portion of Cancer, Scorpio or Pisces, the child born
would be dumb. In case the Moon in the above Yoga is aspected
by benefics, it may get speech after a long time.
Yoga to have Teeth at Birth —If Mars and Saturn are in the
Signs or Arasas owned by Mercury, the child will have teeth at
birth itself.
